title: UN child rights chief slams ‘increased impunity toward international law’ in interview with Arab News

snapshot.title: UN child rights chief slams ‘increased impunity toward international law’ in interview with Arab News
snapshot.description: NEW YORK: “When I’m talking about them, I’m counting those numbers, reciting the numbers in the council. I have images of children in my mind,” Vanessa Frazier, the UN special representative for children and armed conflict, told Arab News, describing how she carries the toll of her own report — 38,558 grave violations against 24,174 children in 2025 — into the Security Council
snapshot.author: Ephrem Kossaify
snapshot.pageTitle: UN child rights chief slams ‘increased impunity toward international law’ in interview with Arab News | Arab News
